review_title: Easy to use tool for small businesses
description: Loving it so far. Will continue using it
author: Jose-Andres C.
pros: Price, ease-of-use, scalability, dashboards
cons: Sometimes it could be a little buggy. Sometimes I need to hit refresh to see my changes reflected
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best proposal workflow tool for freelancers
description: Overall, I am happy with Wethos. You can't beat the price point and the support is best in class. The invoicing tool is pretty basic and leaves a lot to be desired. In general, I find that Wethos is very much set-up to support project based clients and I haven't fully unlocked how to best use it for recurring retainer clients. Another challenge I have is dealing with multi-currency. Half my clients are in the US and half are outside, billed in CAD or EUR. Wethos doesn't support this, so all my financial data in Wethos is kinda useless. At the end of the day, I rely a lot on Wethos to run and grow my business. I am logged in almost every day and for $9/mo it gives me almost everything I need for proposals and invoices.
author: Jason F.
pros: Wethos' proposals workflow is by far the best part of the product. I use it for scoping and pitching all my client projects and securing signatures. Creative invoices from scopes in Proposals is also super handy and the automated workflows built in make my life easier.
cons: There's some general bugginess with the platform. I'm often on chat with support (which is A+ by the way! Shoutout to Mario!) to report bugs or resolve issues.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Great for Freelancers but Could Use More Customization
description: Overall, my experience with Wethos has been positive. It's a great platform for freelancers and small teams looking to manage their finances and proposals in one place. It's simple, effective, and designed with freelancers in mind, but there's still room for growth in terms of customization and integrations.
author: Tom M.
pros: What I liked most about Wethos was its ease of use and how quickly I could set up my projects. The platform is very user-friendly, and the templates made creating proposals and managing finances effortless. The focus on freelancers was a great fit for my business.
cons: The main drawback I found with Wethos was that there are limited customization options for project templates. Additionally, the integrations with other tools could be more extensive to streamline workflow further.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Gets the job done
description: So far Wethos is doing everything I need it to, and despite the cons I listed I'm getting what I need done done. So I'm not out here complaining about a free product. It works, thank you.
author: Alex B.
pros: I'm able to make invoices and the free version has everything I need.
cons: When I add a line item there is a price and quantity field. I expected the site to do the math for me, but I end up just writing the total. So if the description is "Hours worked" and the Quantity is "5", and in the price field I write "$20", I was expecting the invoice to list itself costing $100. I could be missing information about how to use the software, or what I should be including in the boxes, but that's my thoughts. Also, when I email the invoice to someone I'd rather them receive a pdf invoice instead of a link to the invoice. (maybe that's a premium feature and I'm in the free version?)
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Wethos, top tier software
description: I used wethos for a project proposal and it was incredible. This software is so versatile in the way you can put a proposal, contract and payment plan in one place
author: Kevin G.
pros: Wethos is user friendly! When I used this for my project I was able to navigate so easily with its tour function. Overall and incredible software
cons: I actually love everything about it. Maybe the response time from the team but they were very friendly and always got back to me as soon as possible.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Your go to for freelancer tools, templates, and invoicing
author: Melissa Y.
pros: It's super user friendly, also provides a lot of useful tools for freelancers like invoicing and SOW templates.
cons: Was hoping for a free trial of the Pro. I just logged back in after a long hiatus of not freelancing and saw a pop up on my screen saying Pro access was given to me until the end of the year only to see that the offer expires end of 2023.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Efficient All-In-One Tool for Freelancers and Teams
description: My overall experience with Wethos has been very positive. It effectively consolidates multiple functions into a single platform, making project management much more efficient. The ability to handle proposals, invoices, and team communication in one place has been a game-changer for my business. Despite some minor areas for improvement, Wethos has proven to be an invaluable tool.
author: Dayam A.
pros: Wethos excels in integrating proposals, invoicing, and team management into one streamlined platform. The user-friendly interface allows me to create and send proposals quickly, manage invoices with ease, and collaborate with team members efficiently. The platform's all-in-one approach simplifies my workflow and saves valuable time.
cons: While Wethos is a great tool, it could benefit from more advanced reporting features and additional integrations with other software tools. Some aspects of the user interface might also require a learning curve for new users. Improving these areas could enhance the overall user experience
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Big time-saver for a new, one-person agency!
description: My experience was very positive. I provide SEO services, content marketing, digital marketing and content creation and found nearly everything I needed to send one of my first proposals out to a potential client. Bonus: I won the client!
author: Wendy J.
pros: Very easy to use and the templates are plug-and-play. Saved me tons of time as a newbie breaking out on my own.
cons: There's a bit of a learning curve trying to navigate all of the information, templates and tools. But once I figured it out, this service was a huge time-saver for me. It also gave me ideas for services I hadn't considered.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Infinite use with Wethos
description: My experience has been great. I am able turn things around quickly and effortlessly.
author: Kenya H.
pros: The ease of use and flexibility it offers to generate proposals and turn them into to revenue.
cons: There's not much I don't like. I would like to see some integration functionality like building projects into tools like Zoho.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Valuable Tool
description: Suitability depends on individual needs and preferences.
author: Jessica S.
pros: Wethos appears to offer a promising solution for many.
cons: The cost of the platform might not justify the value for some users, especially if they only use a limited number of features.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Wethos gives your company the professionalism it needs
description: Still playing around with the software and discovering the many features. But overall, the experience is very positive.
author: Ramon M.
pros: It makes tracking projects and invoices very easy. Plus, the AI saves us much time and makes the company look professional and tech savvy.
cons: Nothing for now. Everything is polished and intuitive.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Wethos has been an invaluable tool for me.
description: My overall experience was great. Wethos has allowed me to scale my business with fewer headaches and hassles. I'm able to focus on the things that matter most: creating amazing content for my clients. I highly recommend it to anyone looking for an all-in-one solution for their business. Wethos has been an invaluable tool for me. I'm able to access all the features I need in one place and get more done in less time. With Wethos, I've grown my business easily.
author: Tasha B.
pros: The best thing about Wethos is that it serves as a dashboard for everything I need for my media production business. I can manage my projects, collaborate with my team, and keep track of my finances all in one place. It's been a lifesaver in helping me stay organized and efficient.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Wethos is the best!
description: Overall Wethos has helped me organize and come up with projects and pricing as well.
author: Prisma R.
pros: I love everything about Wethos. I love that they have set up a way to make it easier for clients to make payments and automatically make invoices for you.
cons: I don’t have anything bad to say! I think Wethos is overall amazing!
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Wethos helped me find my voice!
author: Dena W.
pros: The reason I use wethos is the ability to help have the right-priced services, find the right partners, and communication with my clients. Well-rounded service - solution based team!
cons: None today - hopefully it will continue to get better as times go on....
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Solid option at a great price point.
author: Benjamin S.
pros: Wethos has pretty much all I need for invoicing and payments for my commercial photography business with the only charges being the processing fees.
cons: I wish invoicing had categories where you could add pass through costs or cost in categories.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Why wethos works
author: Suzanne F.
pros: Takes the guess work out of writing proposals and not underbidding
cons: Ui is not intuitive and gui needs work.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Product designer's take on Wethos
author: Antanas C.
pros: I like the proposal builder which I use most frequently. Also, the template library helped me to build the service solution with ease.
cons: When I return after a couple of days of not using it I always need to refresh the page for some reason. Else there is not much to complain about.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Great program! Hugh k t recommended for your business!
description: 5 out of 5. Would never use a different program now.
author: Branden A.
pros: I liked that it allowed me to use different templates that were very common to what I do.I also liked that it was a very straightforward and easy to pick up on.
cons: Not much at all. It was great. Truly great.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I think I've found the one
description: Wethos is helping my booking process flow smooth
author: Trenise E.
pros: I like how it caters to my needs as a freelancer.
cons: I'm still learning the ropes so there's nothing I like least at the moment.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: A definite MUST!
description: Best experienced! Have managed business perfectly
author: Mariel G.
pros: Business management , the structure, the accessibilities
cons: I had hard time using it in the beginning
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Wethos review from a web developer
author: Immanuel E.
pros: The premade packages that help us organize our estimates
cons: It hard to say, maybe not allowing us to customize the estimate domain.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Great Possibilities
description: REally happy, have yet to put in paid feature but would love to,
author: Rebecca O.
pros: I really love the templates and contracts. As a designer it can be difficult to get the legalities right so this is a really great tool,
cons: Inability to cost in different currencies. Working with a global clientele this would be a great feature add on
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Super helpful for beginners!!
author: Sarah S.
pros: Since there are templates and language for proposals all created within Wethos, I am able to learn as I go and be a complete novice - but appear to have more experience.
cons: I wish the free trial included at least TWO projects, I’m not making enough to really justify the premium version yet.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Great tool
description: I’m really glad that I found the tool. I found it very helpful.
author: Lauren F.
pros: It’s been great to have this tool for guidance on proposals for new clients.
cons: It would be great to have more options for drag and drop templates.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: New User

pros: I’ve just started using Wethos and it’s already super easy to use and integrate into my processes.
cons: Some features not avail in Canada and no app yet so working from my phone isn’t the easiest
